dimensio 0.2.2.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Function reference

Analysis

ca()
Correspondence Analysis
pca()
Principal Components Analysis
predict(<CA>) predict(<PCA>)
Predict New Coordinates

Resampling

bootstrap() summary(<BootstrapVector>)
Partial Bootstrap Analysis
jackknife() summary(<JackknifeVector>)
Jackknife Estimation

Visualization

plot_contributions() plot_cos2()
Visualize Contributions and cos2
plot_rows() plot_columns() plot(<CA>,<missing>) plot(<PCA>,<missing>)
Visualize Factor Map
plot_variance()
Visualize Eigenvalues

Summary

summary(<CA>) summary(<PCA>)
Object Summaries

Classes

CA-class
CA Results
MultivariateAnalysis
Output of Multivariate Data Analysis
MultivariateBootstrap
Output of Bootstrap Replications
MultivariateResults
Multivariate Data Analysis Results
MultivariateSummary
Summary of Multivariate Data Analysis
PCA-class
PCA Results

Getters and Setters

get_coordinates() get_replications() get_contributions() get_correlations() get_cos2() get_data() get_distances() get_eigenvalues() get_inertia() get_variance() dim(<MultivariateAnalysis>) rownames(<MultivariateAnalysis>) colnames(<MultivariateAnalysis>) dimnames(<MultivariateAnalysis>) loadings(<PCA>)
Get Results
`[[`(<CA>,<ANY>,<missing>) `[[`(<PCA>,<ANY>,<missing>)
Extract Parts of an Object

On this page

dimensio is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 1.9000.9000.9000.
